text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days after Admire Vega passed out in the
forest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She undergoes a comprehensive examination, just
to be on the safe side of things. The results show
no abnormalities in either her leg or anywhere
else, allowing her to be discharged from the
hospital.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her weak reply makes my heart ache. To be
honest, it feels like...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't say a word, and I can't bring myself to
speak. We leave the hospital in deafening silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But sure enough...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter when, where, or what the
situation may be—the Overlord's laughter is just
as boisterous as ever.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on your recovery, Ayabe. Please,
accept this from me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I brought you an invitation.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: An invitation?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! And make sure to bring your trainer along
too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fuji warned me—with a face stern enough to
make a demon cower—that permission would not
be granted without the presence of a guardian!
Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though I have no clue what's going on, soon
enough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O brings us to the beach at
night—rather late into the night at that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And what's more...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... I'm sorry this is so sudden, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
W-well actually, we were suddenly invited by
Opera O too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know what we're supposed to be
doing here, though...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm sure it's really important since it's Opera
O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So no one's allowed to fall... asl—zzz...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Uwah! Opera O fell asleep?! But she's always so
disciplined!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...This is a joke.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why did I even come? I'm going—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No, Ayabe... Don't go.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Until the dark of the night has passed, and the
light of the stars has faded...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Be here with us.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something she wants to say, but she sits
down on the sand quietly instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I listen... to the waves crashing on the shore, to
T.M. Opera O's breathing after nodding back off
to sleep, and to the voices of the others quietly
chatting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit there for what feels like a lifetime and yet...
before I know it, it's over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One by one, the stars illuminating the night
disappear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And the sky slowly begins to brighten.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Can you see it? The sun is rising.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: This is the dawn of a new day—for all of us.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(The stars are gone, replaced by the dawn... It's
so bright.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's... too bright. I can't—)

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ngh... ah! I'm so stiff.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Ayabe... It doesn't look like Opera O is
going to wake up, and now Doto is asleep too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
So do you feel up for a run? I'd love for you to
join me!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? H-hold on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In a somewhat uncharacteristic manner, Narita
Top Road begins running without waiting for an
answer. Admire Vega takes off to join her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the sound of the waves now subdued this
early morning, all that can be heard are their
steps running along the shore.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Ayabe, is something wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
In the past, your speed was unbelievable! I
thought... you would be capable of more.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh... It's pointless.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: What's that?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You're too far away, I can't hear youuu!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Ergh!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I SAID IT'S POINTLESS!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
All I wanted was to make up for her death! I was
only trying to win for her! Everything I did was for
her!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But now she's gone! Gone! No one's watching over
me from the stars now!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She's not there anymore! She's not anywhere!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: And the worst part is... she did it for me. She sacrificed herself for me again!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...You could never understand what I'm going
through. So don't bother trying.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: There's nothing left inside me! I'm empty! I-I—

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I... understand. That emptiness, having lost your
reason to run...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: But now that it's gone... how do you really feel?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You say you're empty. But what made you come
here to the beach and spend the night without
any reason given? What made you start running
after I did?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: What are you really thinking in this moment?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I, for one, had fun running together just now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I thought you felt the same way, but maybe that's
just my ego talking.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I guess you're not sure yet. How about we run
some more then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Let's run together until the sky is clear blue!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega takes off once again. She runs on
and on and on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The both of them run until they're spent and fall
asleep, exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By the time the four of them get into a taxi and
back to school, it's already noon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Squinting up at the dazzling light of the sun,
Admire Vega finally speaks.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It was... fun.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Running and competing—I thought it was fun.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
So even though I've lost my purpose—my reason
to run, I...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I still want to run!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: B-but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at her, unable to make up her mind, and
think to myself how kind a sibling she truly is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's afraid, and rightly so. She understands that
our hearts and thoughts are the final threads that
keep those who've passed connected to this
world.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's worried that if she starts running for herself
and forgets about her sister...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then one day, along with her memory, her sister
may disappear forever.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which only means...
choice_data_list: Let's run to make your sister proud.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that in all likelihood, she already has.
After all, Admire Vega has run in the Classic
Triple Crown, the Grand Prix, and several other
senior races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I know if I had a sister like that...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hmph... Whatever.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Would my sister be proud?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Proud of her older sister?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You really think she'll be proud of me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If I keep running and keep winning... Then, when
the day comes that I finally meet her...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: When she finally sees me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Do you think she'll be proud?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rapidly nod my head. The tears welling up in my
eyes begin to spill, and I quickly wipe them away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega chuckles oddly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And under the radiant light of day, she smiles.
